candidate_llm_application: LLM capability ranking via pairwise comparison: ordinal scale by 'scratches harder than' relation between models; reveals capability gaps despite continuous scaling laws.

results.title: Llm Pairwise Capability Ranking: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on LLM pairwise capability ranking, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
